title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Flipkart Books

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Flipkart Books
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Books is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Flipkart Books:
Flipkart Books is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Books!
